titleStmt.title: SII 7.356: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 356. (A.R. No. 159 of 1901). ON THE FIFTH SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . ni¨rvvighnamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . treya
lōkyanagarāraṁbha(ṁ)mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē(t) . svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 131
6 neya va¨rttamāna śrīmukhasaṁvatsarada bēsagayatiṁgaḷu modalāgi rājādhirāja rājaparamē
svara catussamudrādhipati śrīvīrapratāpa hariharamahārāyara nirūpadiṁ śaṁkaradēvavoḍe
yaru bārakūrarājyavana pratipālaneya māḍuva kāladallu maṇigāṟakēriyavoḷagaṇa sō
manāthadēvara saṁnidhiyalu vijayanāyakara maga kēśavanāyakaru Amāvāse dvādaśeya dha¨r(ṁ)mma
kke koṭṭa bāḷina vivara Ayiraḍiyavoḷagaṇa daṁḍebeṭṭinalu tāU badda brahmadāyada mūla
da bāḷina catussīmeya vivara kaḍasālagadde mūḍalū kēśavanāvudana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
teṁkalu mūḍaḷagina vāsudēvana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu yiṁdaṁ mūḍalu
baḍagalu viṣṇunāvudana makkaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi(ṁ)ntī catussīmeyavoḷaguḷḷa ga
dde 1 kkaṁ bittuva bedegaṇagilu hāne 50 Ajjinatāṟena voḷagaṇa gadde yi catussīmeya
vivara mūḍalu vorāḷa gōviṁdakāraṁtana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu gaṁka ta gaḍiyi
ṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu viṣṇunāvudana makkaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu haṁḍana nā
raṇa kāraṁtana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi(ṁ)ntī catussīmeya voḷaguḷḷa gadde 2 kkaṁ bittuva hāne
28 Ubhayaṁ gadde 3 kaṁ bittuva hāne 78 hiriya gaddege kaḍasālakeṟeya nīru holakke baṁdadu
yeraḍu gaddege tuṁniccheye keṟeya nīru holake baṁdadu yi bāḷiṁge teṟuva teṟu hāne 1
yi bāḷanū kriṣṇa Alaseya maga vāsudēva Alasige nāyaru mūlavāgi koṭṭaru vāsudē
va Alase teṟu dēvasva Akara Āṁnyāya haḍike hodake beḍuguḷu muṁtāgi Ellavanū te
ttu mānagēḍu baragēḍillade ha ne varaveyakkiyāgi prativaruśa 1 kkaṁ naḍa suva Akkināga
ṁḍugadalu mūḍe Aṟanū taṁdu hāyikuḷanu hoṟakūli Āṟu [Eraya] Anāya kā
yalāṟade yiṣṭakke hōda maṁṇiṁge biṭṭa bāḷu tā[U*] baddha bra(ṁ)hmadāyada mūlada bāḷana
catussīmeya vivara kōṭiyappanavare gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu caṁnakēśava bēliyiṁ
daṁ keḷage taṁna Aṁṇana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu naḍava heddāriyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu yi
(ṁ)ntī catussīmeyavoḷage hōdamaṁṇiṁge biṭṭadu gadde 1 kkaṁ bittuva hāne 33 kēśavanā
yakarige kāṇikeyāgi voṁdu kuṟupeyali yeraḍu teṁguma vanu
bahanu yi dha¨r(ṁ)mmada Akkiya naḍasuvadakke Ada hoṇe yisvaraAlaseya hiriyappanū
kēśavaAlase hodamaṁṇanū nāyarumūlavanū baddu Akkiya naḍasuvanu . yiṁtappu
dake sākṣigaḷu kēśavakāraṁtana maga gōviṁdakāraṁta paḍuvamaneya haṁḍana vi
ṣṇukāraṁtana maga nāraṇakāraṁta tējibhaṭṭaAyyanavara maga mayijaṁṇana
varu kōṭiyappaseṭṭiya maga dharaṇiseṭṭi yiṁtappudakke sōmayidēvara sēnabō
va paṁḍaridēvana baraha yiṁtappudake kēśavadēvanāyakara voppa mayi
lāradēvaru A ka¨rttana voppa bhagavatihoṇekāṟana voppa bhagavatisākṣigaḷu
voppa śrīdha¨rmmamahā śrīvītarāga maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrīBelow this are found the following two lines in characters belonging to the same
yaśvara saṁvacharada bēsageya tiṁgaḷu modalāgi vijayanāyakara
maga saptaṁṇanavaru Ayiraḍiyavoḷage haṁḍana kriṣṇakāraṁtana maga
Digital edition of SII 7.356 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
